# Shipping and tracking.

How long will it take for an order to ship?

Once your order is placed, you will receive an Order Email Confirmation. You will then receive a follow up email with the tracking number once the order ships, so that you can track its whereabouts as the expected delivery date approaches.

Orders typically process through the fulfillment center and ship within 24-48 hours of the corresponding business day. [...] International Shipping cost is $13.98

Estimated shipping time is 15-22 days, which can vary, depending on customs protocols and checkpoints in each respective country. You will receive an email confirmation with your tracking code once the order ships so you can track your order along the way.

OF NOTE:Customers are responsible for paying any international VAT, sales tax, or custom duties. As each country is unique in this regard, we're unable to speak to each country specifically. This is a topic of empowered responsibility for you to explore.
